page_metadata.biotools__summary:
a software package for flexible identification of phenotype-specific subpathways in cancer progression.

Flexible Identification of Phenotype-Specific Subpathways.

A network-based systems biology tool for flexible identification of phenotype-specific subpathways in the cancer gene expression data with multiple categories (such as multiple subtype or developmental stages of cancer)
